title: Cybersecurity Breach
description: Unauthorized access or hacking attempt that compromises system data.
mitigationSuggestion: Implement firewalls, intrusion detection, and multi-factor authentication.
contingencySuggestion: Maintain incident response plan and backup systems.

title: Budget Overrun
description: Project costs exceeding approved budget due to scope creep or estimation errors.
mitigationSuggestion: Track expenses, enforce change control, use contingency reserves.
